events.name: San Diego Padres at Atlanta Braves

highlights.headline: San Diego Padres vs. Atlanta Braves: Game Highlight
highlights.description: San Diego Padres vs. Atlanta Braves: Game Highlight

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (San Diego Padres vs. Atlanta Braves: Game Highlight) 2026/07/23 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Chris Sale matched a season-high with 11 strikeouts and the Atlanta Braves hit four home runs in a 6-5 win over the San Diego Padres on Thursday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chris Sale strikes out 11 as the Braves hit 4 home runs to edge the Padres 6-5

video.headline: San Diego Padres vs. Atlanta Braves: Game Highlight

highlights.headline: Twins salvage series split vs. Guardians with 3-1 win
highlights.description: Twins salvage series split vs. Guardians with 3-1 win

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Twins salvage series split vs. Guardians with 3-1 win) 2026/07/23 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Trevor Larnach and Luke Keaschall both delivered two-out RBI singles in the 12th inning, giving the Minnesota Twins a 3-1 win over the Cleveland Guardians on Thursday and a split of their four-game series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Trevor Larnach and Luke Keaschall get RBIs in 12th as Twins beat Guardians 3-1 for series split

video.headline: Twins salvage series split vs. Guardians with 3-1 win

tracking.trackingName: COM_MLB Highlight (Twins salvage series split vs. Guardians with 3-1 win) 2026/07/23 ESHEET

events.name: Tampa Bay Rays at Toronto Blue Jays

highlights.headline: Tampa Bay Rays vs. Toronto Blue Jays: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Tampa Bay Rays vs. Toronto Blue Jays: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Tampa Bay Rays vs. Toronto Blue Jays: Game Highlights) 2026/07/23 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Shane Bieber pitched a season-high seven innings to win his second straight start, George Springer reached base three times and drove in a run, and the Toronto Blue Jays beat the Tampa Bay Rays 3-1 on Thursday to avoid a four-game sweep.
headlines.shortLinkText: Shane Bieber pitches season-high 7 innings as Blue Jays beat Rays 3-1 to avoid 4-game sweep

video.headline: Tampa Bay Rays vs. Toronto Blue Jays: Game Highlights
